mapper.select: SELECT MISSION_NO, MISSION_TITLE, REWARD_POINT, MISSION_IMAGE_URL, MISSION_TYPE FROM MISSION_TBL ORDER BY MISSION_NO ASC

SELECT M.MISSION_NO, M.MISSION_TITLE, M.REWARD_POINT, M.MISSION_IMAGE_URL, M.MISSION_TYPE FROM MEMBER_MISSION_TBL MM JOIN MISSION_TBL M ON MM.MISSION_NO = M.MISSION_NO WHERE MM.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND M.MISSION_TYPE = 'RANDOM' AND MM.ASSIGNED_YMD = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT MISSION_NO, MISSION_TITLE, REWARD_POINT, MISSION_IMAGE_URL, MISSION_TYPE FROM ( SELECT MISSION_NO, MISSION_TITLE, REWARD_POINT, MISSION_IMAGE_URL, MISSION_TYPE FROM MISSION_TBL WHERE MISSION_TYPE = 'RANDOM' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_MISSION_TBL ( USER_MISSION_NO, MISSION_NO, MEMBER_ID, ASSIGNED_YMD, COMPLETED_YMD, CERT_IMAGE_URL ) VALUES ( USER_MISSION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{missionNo}, #{memberId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), NULL, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE_TBL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND ATTEND_YMD = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE_TBL ( ATTENDANCE_NO, MEMBER_ID, ATTEND_YMD, REWARD_POINT ) VALUES ( attendance_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), 5 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_MISSION_TBL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MISSION_NO = ( SELECT MISSION_NO FROM MISSION_TBL WHERE MISSION_TYPE = 'BASIC' ) AND COMPLETED_YMD = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_MISSION_TBL ( USER_MISSION_NO, MISSION_NO, MEMBER_ID, COMPLETED_YMD, CERT_IMAGE_URL ) VALUES ( USER_MISSION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, ( SELECT MISSION_NO FROM MISSION_TBL WHERE MISSION_TYPE = 'BASIC' ), #{memberId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_MISSION_TBL MM JOIN MISSION_TBL M ON MM.MISSION_NO = M.MISSION_NO WHERE MM.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND M.MISSION_TYPE = 'BONUS' AND MM.COMPLETED_YMD = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_MISSION_TBL MM JOIN MISSION_TBL M ON MM.MISSION_NO = M.MISSION_NO WHERE MM.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND M.MISSION_TYPE = 'RANDOM' AND MM.COMPLETED_YMD = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT MISSION_NO, MISSION_TITLE, REWARD_POINT, MISSION_IMAGE_URL, MISSION_TYPE FROM MISSION_TBL WHERE MISSION_NO = #{missionNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_MISSION_TBL ( USER_MISSION_NO, MISSION_NO, MEMBER_ID, COMPLETED_YMD, CERT_IMAGE_URL ) VALUES ( USER_MISSION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{missionNo}, #{memberId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), NULL )
